channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
item.description: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

item.title: Our expert praised Creality's K2 Plus 3D printer after his workshop tests — and it's just got a massive summer discount
item.description: Creality K2 Plus with the Premium Accessory Pack offers a feature-packed way to step into high-end 3D printing.

item.title: Microsoft discovers new multi-malware package 'GigaWiper' capable of deploying wipers and ransomware
item.description: One wiper can destroy a computer in different ways, but it can also spy on users.

item.title: Canicule : vous ouvrez mal vos fenêtres, cette appli gratuite calcule l’heure parfaite pour le faire
item.description: Ouvrir ses fenêtres au mauvais moment, c'est faire entrer la chaleur au lieu de la chasser. Le simulateur Nadir calcule pour vous les bonnes heures, gratuitement. Et donne des conseils car ce n'est pas juste la lecture d'un thermomètre.

item.title: Trois forfaits à retenir cette semaine, du sport au voyage en passant par le petit prix
item.description: Trois forfaits se détachent cette semaine, chacun pour un usage précis. Trois offres sans engagement, à comparer selon les besoins.

item.title: Netflix is turning into YouTube
item.description: Netflix has shows and movies. And video games. And live sports. And podcasts. And also, apparently, YouTube videos? For a company that used to seem like the next big thing in TV, it all feels a little frenetic, and maybe a tad desperate. For a company that sees sleep as its primary competitor, it might […]

item.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
item.description: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

item.title: You can now easily find out if a game is compatible with the Steam Machine
item.description: You just have to know where to look on the Steam page.

item.title: Razer's new Cinnamoroll headphones feature adorable floppy ears — and they're just too cute to pass up
item.description: Razer has unveiled the next piece in its growing Sanrio collection, the Kraken Kitty V2 BT – Cinnamoroll Edition.

item.title: Google's TabFM skips per-dataset training and still predicts on tables it's never seen
item.description: The vast majority of business data is tabular — living in data warehouses, CRMs, and financial ledgers — yet building a reliable model from it still means training a new one from scratch for every dataset, then maintaining hyperparameter tuning loops, feature engineering, and retraining pipelines to fight data drift. Google Research is proposing a way around that: a new foundation model called TabFM that treats tabular prediction as an in-context learning problem instead.It can generate predictions for a new, unseen table in a single forward pass. For enterprise developers and AI engineers, th...

item.title: Lenovo's 16-inch ThinkPad E16 Gen 3 laptop for students and professionals gets a big July discount using this special code — I found the configurations that give you the best value for money
item.description: With an Intel or AMD processor, 16GB of RAM and a 1TB SSD, Lenovo's ThinkPad E16 Gen 3 laptop is an easy recommendation from me.

item.title: Coupe du monde de la FIFA 2026 : pourquoi les diffuseurs s’indignent qu’ExpressVPN soit sponsor du championnat
item.description: La FIFA a signé un contrat pour faire d'ExpressVPN un sponsor officiel de la Coupe du monde de football 2026. Une décision qui ne passe pas pour les principaux diffuseurs européens.

item.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
item.description: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

item.title: How to watch Spain vs Belgium: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final as La Roja face Red Devils
item.description: Here's how to watch Spain vs Belgium for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Lamine Yamal & Co. seek a quarter-final win.

item.title: Chrome : Google dégaine deux mises à jour de sécurité pour colmater 27 failles
item.description: Google a déployé deux mises à jour de Chrome en l'espace de 24 heures pour corriger 27 vulnérabilités. Deux failles critiques ont aussi été colmatées.

item.title: How to watch US TV from anywhere in the world – stream your favorite TV shows and sports when overseas
item.description: Take the centrepiece of America's living room with you wherever you go with our guide on how to watch US TV wherever you are in the world.

item.title: Epson's EcoTank ET-2400 just got an Amazon price cut — and it includes enough ink to keep you printing for years
item.description: The Epson EcoTank ET-2400 prints, scans, and copies, while its refillable ink tanks help keep output costs low.

item.title: J’ai installé un ventilateur au plafond en pleine canicule : je peux enfin dormir sans la clim (ou presque)
item.description: J'ai installé un ventilateur de plafond dans ma chambre bordelaise non climatisée, et dès la première nuit, j'ai pu couper mon petit climatiseur mobile bien plus tôt. Voici ce que ça change vraiment, et pourquoi la science valide ce ressenti.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures voitures citadines électriques en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous conduisez majoritairement en ville et avez envie de passer à l’électrique ? Pas besoin d’une gigantesque berline ou d'un SUV ! Les voitures citadines sont compactes et moins onéreuses. Nous avons testé et rassemblé ici les meilleures citadines électriques disponibles en 2026.

item.title: Proton VPN brings official one-click installs to the Linux Snap Store — but some features are still missing
item.description: Proton VPN just dropped its first official app on the Linux Snap Store. While it boasts easy one-click installation and a verified publisher badge, users will have to wait for split tunneling, the Stealth protocol, and ARM support.

item.title: What Watching a Soccer Final Does to Your Body, According to Science
item.description: A recent study tracked hundreds of soccer fans until their favorite team reached the final of a tournament. Their stress levels skyrocketed, and their heart rates jumped too.

item.title: La JBL Go 4 est à moitié prix, l’occasion d’acquérir une enceinte compacte et pas cher pour vos sorties de l’été
item.description: L'habit ne fait pas le moine et la JBL Go 4 le prouve puisque son petit gabarit renferme un son puissant, parfait pour une soirée en petit comité. Chez Carrefour, elle voit son prix baisser à 24,99 euros au lieu de 49,99 euros à la base.

item.title: Disney Plus is reportedly looking into a free streaming tier
item.description: Disney Plus is considering making some of its content free to watch, according to a report from Business Insider. A source tells the outlet that Adam Smith, Disney's chief product and technology officer, mentioned a free streaming tier during the company's town hall on Thursday. It's not clear which shows or movies the purported free […]

item.title: Hiboy P6 Fat Tire Electric Bike Review: Smooth Sailing
item.description: Take on sand, snow, mud, gravel—this is the ebike for all your off-roading adventures.

item.title: Get a free month of streaming on Fox One with this BOGO deal
item.description: Fox One is offering a buy one month, get one month free deal through July 19. Save $19.99 and tune into the final World Cup matches.

item.title: Anker’s 3-in-1 Qi2.2 charging station is $95 off
item.description: If you’re looking to declutter your nightstand and quickly charge up to three of your most-used gadgets, Anker’s Prime Wireless Charging Station is an easy way to do both. The station has spots for your MagSafe-ready iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods, and right now it’s down to a new all-time low of $134.99 ($95 off) […]

item.title: Le secret le moins bien gardé : le Galaxy Z Fold 8 au nouveau format est déjà exposé dans un Samsung Store
item.description: Le Galaxy Z Fold 8 doté d'un nouveau format se montre déjà dans un magasin de Samsung en Corée.

item.title: Accro à Claude ? Anthropic lance Reflect, l’outil qui analyse à quel point vous êtes dépendant de l’IA
item.description: Anthropic lance Reflect, une fonctionnalité qui analyse votre utilisation de Claude afin de vous aider à mieux comprendre la place qu’occupe l’IA dans votre quotidien. Reflect propose un tableau de bord détaillant vos habitudes d’utilisation et pose des questions pour encourager une réflexion sur votre interaction avec l’intelligence artificielle.

item.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
item.description: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

item.title: Meta’s Pursuit of the 'Careless People' Author Is Relentless and Self-Defeating
item.description: Yes, Sarah Wynn-Williams violated her deal to stay silent. But the power disparity bolsters the view that Meta is a heartless bully.

item.title: A fresh TV spot for Spider-Man: Brand New Day has revealed more of the Marvel hero's battle with the Hulk — and teased the possible return of another MCU villain
item.description: A new teaser for Spider-Man 4 shows more of the titular hero's fight with the Hulk in the former's next MCU movie.
